narrative:
Clark (precinct in Clinton County) has 1,322 registered voters, with 54.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 38.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 31.5 percentage points.
